name: Golden Hour Latte
description: Double shot espresso, oat milk, and a hint of turmeric sunshine. A warm, glowing start to your day.

name: Lumina Flat White
description: Micro-foamed milk folded into our house-blend medium roast. Smooth and velvety perfection.

name: House Espresso
description: Rich, bold single-origin espresso shot with caramel crema from Ethiopian beans.

name: Spiced Chai Latte
description: Spiced black tea concentrate with steamed oat milk and a hint of vanilla bean.

name: Minty Matcha Cloud
description: Ceremonial matcha topped with mint-infused cold foam. A vibrant, airy escape.

name: Rosemary Bloom Cold Brew
description: Sparkling cold brew infused with fresh rosemary and peach bitters. Refreshingly sophisticated.

name: French Butter Croissant
description: Flaky, golden-baked all-butter croissant made fresh every morning in-house.

name: Lumina Avocado Toast
description: Sourdough with smashed avocado, heirloom tomatoes, micro-greens and chili flakes.

name: Truffle Parmesan Fries
description: Crispy golden fries tossed in truffle oil, parmesan, and fresh herbs.

name: Pesto Panini
description: Grilled ciabatta with basil pesto, mozzarella, roasted peppers, and arugula.

name: Matcha Tiramisu
description: Layers of matcha-soaked ladyfingers with mascarpone cream and ceremonial matcha dust.

name: Dark Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm molten dark chocolate cake with vanilla bean ice cream and raspberry coulis.

name: Acai Berry Bowl
description: Blended acai with banana, granola, coconut flakes, and fresh seasonal berries.

name: Mixed Berry Tart
description: Buttery pate sablee filled with vanilla pastry cream and topped with fresh berries.

name: Nitro Cold Brew
description: Slow-steeped 24-hour cold brew served on nitro tap for a creamy, smooth finish.

name: Flourless Chocolate Brownie
description: Rich, fudgy dark chocolate brownie made with almond flour. Decadently gluten-free.
